athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.description: A single record that follows every athlete through their entire journey — from first inquiry to graduation. Rich profiles, guardians, documents, and enrollment in one place.

features.title: Rich athlete profiles
features.description: Age, contact, sport, level, and configurable attributes — the fields you actually need for each discipline, driven by attribute sets.

features.title: Guardian relationships
features.description: Link parents, guardians, and emergency contacts to any athlete. Guardians can log in to view schedules, invoices, and updates.

features.title: Documents & waivers
features.description: Store medical forms, waivers, and legal documents on the athlete record. Expiry dates trigger renewal reminders automatically.

features.title: Multi-branch enrollment
features.description: Enrol athletes across branches without duplicating records. History, performance, and payments follow them everywhere.

features.title: Progress history
features.description: See attendance, performance, and payment history on one timeline. Perfect for retention conversations with families.

features.title: Privacy by design
features.description: Fine-grained access control — coaches see only their squads, admins see the network, guardians see just their child.

use_case.quote: Onboarding a new athlete used to take 40 minutes across three spreadsheets. Now it's one form, and every downstream system just knows.
use_case.author: Layla Haddad

related.title: Teams
related.description: Group athletes into squads and age brackets.

related.title: Scheduling
related.description: Sessions, RSVPs, and tap-to-check-in attendance.

related.title: Performance
related.description: Track metrics with sport-specific attribute sets.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Build squads and age groups, assign coaches, and keep rosters in sync across every program. Team-level views for coaches, roster tools for admins.

features.title: Squads & age groups
features.description: Create teams by sport, level, or age band. Move athletes between rosters in bulk when tryouts run.

features.title: Coach assignments
features.description: Assign head coaches and assistants per team. Coaches only see the teams they manage.

features.title: Roster limits
features.description: Set minimum + maximum sizes per team. Overflow drops into a waitlist automatically.

features.title: Team performance
features.description: Aggregate athlete metrics into team-level dashboards. Compare across squads in one view.

features.title: Team-based invoicing
features.description: Bill by team — one invoice covers every athlete on the roster with automatic guardian split.

features.title: Team broadcasts
features.description: Message an entire roster + guardians in one action. Reply-to-coach threading built in.

related.title: Athletes
related.description: Rich profiles, guardians, and documents.

related.title: Scheduling
related.description: Sessions, matches, and RSVPs per team.

related.title: Payments
related.description: Invoice by team with guardian split.

scheduling.title: Scheduling & attendance
scheduling.description: Plan training and fixtures, then capture attendance in a tap. Recurring schedules, RSVP reminders, and per-branch calendars — all in one place.

features.title: Recurring sessions
features.description: Set up weekly training with one click. Modify one instance without breaking the pattern.

features.title: RSVP + reminders
features.description: Members get email/SMS reminders before each session. Coaches see who's confirmed at a glance.

features.title: Tap-to-check-in
features.description: Athletes scan a QR or tap an NFC card at the door. Attendance updates in real time on the coach view.

features.title: Multi-branch calendars
features.description: Every branch has its own calendar, or view the whole network in one composite. No more spreadsheet cross-referencing.

features.title: Guardian pickup verification
features.description: Log who dropped off and picked up each athlete. Digital audit trail for safeguarding compliance.

features.title: Attendance analytics
features.description: See attendance rates per athlete, team, and coach. Flag drop-offs before retention becomes a problem.

related.title: Teams
related.description: Assign coaches, size rosters, and message squads.

related.title: Reception
related.description: Front-desk approvals for registrations + refunds.

related.title: Reports
related.description: Attendance dashboards for finance and ops.

payments.title: Payments & memberships
payments.description: Plans, invoices, and renewals with a clear view of outstanding balances and revenue. Stripe + Paddle built in; local gateways on Enterprise.

features.title: Recurring memberships
features.description: Monthly, quarterly, or annual plans with proration on upgrades. Cancellations settle to the end of the current period.

features.title: Invoices + reminders
features.description: Automated PDF invoices with configurable reminder cadences. Guardians can pay directly from the email.

features.title: Multiple gateways
features.description: Stripe on every plan. Paddle on Pro. Custom local gateways on Enterprise for regional coverage.

features.title: Family accounts
features.description: One guardian pays for multiple athletes. Family discounts calculated automatically on the invoice.

features.title: AR dashboards
features.description: See outstanding balances by branch, team, and family. Follow-up workflows for overdue accounts.

features.title: PCI-safe by default
features.description: Card data never touches our servers. Everything goes through the gateway's Elements / Iframe integration.

related.title: Athletes
related.description: Link invoices to athlete records automatically.

related.title: Reception
related.description: Front-desk refund + adjustment approvals.

related.title: Reports
related.description: Revenue, AR, and churn dashboards.

performance.title: Performance & progress
performance.description: Sport-specific metrics rendered from configurable attribute sets — no code changes per sport. Track fitness benchmarks, skill progression, and match stats.

features.title: Configurable attribute sets
features.description: Define what performance means for your sport. Server-driven UI renders the right form for each discipline.

features.title: Longitudinal history
features.description: Every metric captured over time. Coaches spot progression curves and plateau moments in one view.

features.title: Squad comparisons
features.description: Compare athletes head-to-head or against squad benchmarks. Great for tryouts and selection meetings.

features.title: Sport-specific reports
features.description: Auto-generated progress reports customized per sport. Share directly with families as branded PDFs.

features.title: Belt & grading progression
features.description: Martial arts + gymnastics: belt/grading schemes with prerequisites, testing dates, and certificate generation.

features.title: AI-drafted summaries
features.description: Turn a season of raw data into a plain-language progress summary — coaches review and edit before sending.

related.title: Athletes
related.description: Store metrics on the athlete's timeline.

related.title: Attribute engine
related.description: The engine behind sport-agnostic forms + reports.

related.title: AI Assistant
related.description: Auto-draft progress summaries + attribute sets.

reception.title: Reception
reception.description: The front-desk approvals queue for registrations, documents, refunds, and adjustments. Keep the desk running while owners focus on strategy.

features.title: Unified approval queue
features.description: Every pending action — new registrations, refund requests, document uploads — in one prioritized list.

features.title: One-click approvals
features.description: Approve or reject with a reason in one action. Downstream systems (invoices, rosters) update automatically.

features.title: Document verification
features.description: Preview medical forms + waivers inline. Mark as verified or request corrections in the same view.

features.title: Guardian communication
features.description: Message the family directly from the approval task. Full thread history stays attached.

features.title: Branch-scoped access
features.description: Front desk sees only their branch's queue by default. Owners can flip to a network-wide view.

features.title: Desk-level analytics
features.description: Track average approval time, refund rates, and backlog per desk. Continuous improvement without spreadsheets.

related.title: Payments
related.description: Approve refunds and adjustments from the queue.

related.title: Athletes
related.description: Verify documents on the athlete record.

related.title: Reports
related.description: Desk performance + backlog dashboards.

reports.title: Reports & dashboards
reports.description: Prebuilt dashboards for finance, ops, retention, and performance — plus custom reports and scheduled exports on Pro and Enterprise plans.

features.title: Prebuilt dashboards
features.description: Finance (revenue, AR, churn), ops (attendance, retention), and safeguarding — all ready on day one.

features.title: Custom reports (Pro+)
features.description: Drag-and-drop report builder for the exact numbers your board asks about. Save + share with the team.

features.title: Scheduled exports
features.description: Auto-email CSVs and PDFs on a cadence you set. Landing in the finance director's inbox every Monday, hands-off.

features.title: Multi-branch roll-ups
features.description: One number for the whole network, or slice by branch, team, or coach. Pivots in one click.

features.title: Board-ready PDFs
features.description: Every report exports as a branded PDF suitable for board decks and quarterly reviews.

features.title: Natural-language queries
features.description: Ask a question in plain language, get a chart back. Powered by our AI Assistant (Growth+).

related.title: Payments
related.description: Feed revenue + AR data into finance dashboards.

related.title: Scheduling
related.description: Attendance rates power retention reports.

related.title: AI Assistant
related.description: Natural-language queries on top of your data.

safeguarding.title: Safeguarding
safeguarding.description: Compliance records, incident logging, and role-scoped access — everything a modern academy needs to demonstrate a culture of safety.

features.title: Coach credential tracking
features.description: Certifications, background checks, and safeguarding training all logged per coach with expiry alerts.

features.title: Incident reporting
features.description: Structured incident forms with severity levels, follow-up workflows, and audit trail from open to closure.

features.title: Role-scoped access
features.description: Safeguarding officer sees the full picture; coaches see their squad; other staff see nothing sensitive.

features.title: Guardian pickup verification
features.description: Digital log of who dropped off and picked up each athlete — signed, timestamped, and searchable.

features.title: Compliance dashboards
features.description: One view of every open incident, expiring credential, and pending training. Board-ready evidence.

features.title: GDPR / DPA ready
features.description: Export or delete personal data per athlete on request. Data residency options on Enterprise.

related.title: Reception
related.description: Verify documents at intake.

related.title: Enterprise security
related.description: SSO, audit logs, and data residency.

related.title: Reports
related.description: Compliance dashboards and audit exports.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.description: Ship attribute-set drafts, progress summaries, and drill recommendations from a plain-language prompt. Available on Growth and above as a paid add-on.

features.title: Attribute-set drafts
features.description: Describe a sport in one paragraph, get a proposed attribute set back. Edit and publish in minutes.

features.title: Progress summaries
features.description: Turn a season of raw data into a family-ready progress summary. Coaches review + edit before sending.

features.title: Insight queries
features.description: Ask questions in plain English and get a chart back — 'which teams dropped attendance last month?'

features.title: Drill recommendations
features.description: Suggest drills from your library that target a specific development goal. Filtered by age and level.

features.title: Private by design
features.description: Your data never trains external models. Inference runs against isolated tenants; audit logs on every query.

features.title: Bring your own key
features.description: Enterprise plans support BYO OpenAI / Anthropic keys so cost + governance stay on your side.

related.title: Performance
related.description: AI-drafted progress summaries.

related.title: Reports
related.description: Natural-language queries on your data.

related.title: Attribute engine
related.description: AI-generated attribute-set drafts.

attribute-engine.title: Attribute engine
attribute-engine.description: The sport-agnostic engine behind Academorix. Every sport-variable field is configuration — add a discipline, tune its metrics, and the right forms and views appear.

features.title: Server-driven UI
features.description: Forms + views render from JSON schemas served by the backend. No client-side rebuild per sport.

features.title: Bilingual labels
features.description: Every attribute carries EN + AR labels + hints. RTL-ready forms render automatically.

features.title: Versioned schemas
features.description: Old records keep their old schema. New records use the current one. History stays accurate.

features.title: AI-generated drafts
features.description: Describe a new sport in a paragraph — Academorix drafts an attribute set from your description.

features.title: Validation built in
features.description: Type-safe fields (int / decimal / enum / date / time) with min/max, patterns, and dependent conditions.

features.title: Access-controlled
features.description: Some fields (medical, safeguarding) can be role-scoped so only authorized staff see them.

related.title: Performance
related.description: The primary consumer of attribute sets.

related.title: AI Assistant
related.description: AI-drafted attribute sets in minutes.
